nodes.name: Lemon-chested greenlet
nodes.summary: Lemon-chested greenlet（Lemon-chested greenlet，学名 Hylophilus thoracicus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联16个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: These include terra firme, várzea forest, the transitional forest between those two, gallery forest, restinga, cloudforest, and wooded urban areas. In elevation it ranges in Brazil mostly from sea level to though locally higher. It reaches in Colombia, in Ecuador, in Peru, and in Venezuela
